name: Refresh a Facebook page token from Jed
description: Jed has a freshly-regenerated FB page token and wants it installed. Solomon already has the /setfbtoken receiver — this template handles the Sam-side validation + commit if /setfbtoken is broken or Jed sends the token in free text.
trigger_examples: fix the irish craftsman fb token, here's the new one: <token>
prompt_template: Sam: validate the new Facebook page token {{token}} for page {{page}} by hitting Graph API /me?access_token=...; if valid, update the FB_{{page_upper}}_TOKEN line in /root/solomon-v4/.env and pm2 restart solomon-v4 --update-env. Confirm to Solomon with the validated page name + expiry. Never log the token itself.
escalation_conditions: token validation fails (expired, wrong page, wrong account)
token is missing or looks like a placeholder
page name doesn't match the validation response

smoke_test.trigger_message: set fb token for irish_craftsman: EAAB...example

notes: Prefer the existing /setfbtoken slash command (bot.js) — that path validates + persists without going through dispatch. This template is the dispatch fallback for free-text phrasings.
